author: BogdanS
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Track your anime, movies, and TV shows — with episode tracking, progress stats, upcoming release alerts, and embeddable widgets.

manifest.author: BogdanS
manifest.description: Track your anime, movies, books, manga and TV shows; with episode tracking, progress stats, upcoming release alerts, and embeddable widgets.
manifest.name: WatchLog

name: WatchLog

releases.author: Shynkro
releases.description:
## What's Changed

## WatchLog 2.0.0

The biggest update yet - WatchLog now tracks **books and manga** alongside your watchlist, with a brand-new reading system, a unified activity log, and a poster-driven Cards view.

### Highlights

**Reading tab (new)**
Track Books and Manga independently from your watchlist - covers, progress (pages/chapters/volumes), ratings, custom fields, auto-generated notes with a Favorite Quotes section, and API lookups via Google Books and Jikan.

**Cards view**
A responsive poster grid for the Watchlist, now the default view, with artwork auto-fetched from Jikan, TMDB, Google Books, and OMDb.

**Community ratings**
See IMDb, MAL, AniList, or TMDB scores next to your own star rating, with automatic refresh.

**Log tab (new)**
A unified, day-grouped timeline of everything you watch and read, with color-coded actions and a source filter.

**Skip Episodes**
Mark fillers and recaps per season so they're excluded from your progress - define them right in the season syntax.

**Reading everywhere**
Books and manga now flow into the Dashboard, Upcoming, and Custom Lists too.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Shynkro/watchlog-obsidian-plugin/compare/1.1.0...2.0.0
releases.name: v2.0.0 - Reading Tab, Log Tab, Cards style
